name: Zustand Custom Design Engine & Dynamic Forms Configurator

proposal.problem: The current application architecture relies on React Context + useReducer to manage the designer's state. When modifying single text fields or canvas alignments, the entire React component tree re-renders. Additionally, hosts lack tools to batch ingest guest lists from a CSV file or configure dynamic RSVP forms.
proposal.solution: Introduce Zustand state store selective subscribers, client-side CSV parser uploader, and adaptive form configurators.

filesToCreate.purpose: Zustand store containing CanvasDesign and GuestRoster.
Upload and ingest guest lists from CSV.
Enable/disable specific fields in guest RSVP form.

filesToModify.change: Switch SigilProvider to Zustand store selectors.
Mount CSV button and form config panels.

inScope: Full migration of application state to Zustand.
Client-side CSV file parsing and roster injection.
outOfScope: Multi-phase envelope animations and Framer Motion visual timelines (Phase 4).

architecturalDecisions.choice: Single store useSigilStore managing design, guest, and roster state.
architecturalDecisions.why: Enables component-level subscription filtering to avoid whole-tree context re-renders.

architecturalDecisions.choice: Implement lightweight parser parseGuestCsv(text) mapping headers 'name' and 'email'.
architecturalDecisions.why: Avoids bulky npm dependencies while handling commas and escaping.

architecturalDecisions.choice: Store RsvpFormConfig properties on the InvitationDesign model.
architecturalDecisions.why: Ensures form configurations sync with canvas designs.

risksAndMitigations.risk: Memory lag with large CSV uploads
risksAndMitigations.mitigation: Limit parser payload bounds to 500 rows maximum.
Verify headers case-insensitively and prompt templates on errors.

tasks: Scan and verify safety of zustand package
Install zustand dependency in project workspace
Port all state properties from SigilAppState and initial defaults
Implement store mutations corresponding to all previous reducer action handlers
Integrate localStorage sync utility within the store configuration
Refactor src/App.tsx replacing SigilProvider hook with Zustand selector calls
Refactor editor canvas, Toolbar, LeftPanel, and DashboardView to reference store selectors directly
Assert that existing unit tests pass cleanly after context removal
Create custom parsing utility src/utils/csvParser.ts resolving names and email properties
Integrate button into GuestRosterPanel triggering batch additions into the store
Add unit tests validating parser behavior against typical inputs and edge-case syntax
Define RsvpFormConfig parameters inside types and store structures
Update recipient invitation RSVP form to selectively render input elements based on configuration settings
Execute unit and integration tests confirming core stability
Build production package checking compilation success
